title: TITLE 9CIVIL CODE--ANCILLARIES
doc_html:
TITLE 9

CIVIL CODE--ANCILLARIES

CODE PRELIMINARY TITLE [BLANK]

CODE BOOK I--OF PERSONS

CODE TITLE I--NATURAL AND JURIDICAL PERSONS

CHAPTER 1. WOMEN

PART I. IN GENERAL

§51. Civil rights and duties

           Women have the same rights, authority, privileges, and immunities, and shall perform the same obligations and duties as men in the holding of office including the civil functions of tutor, under tutor, curator, under curator, administrator, executor, arbitrator, and notary public.
doc_text:
TITLE 9
CIVIL CODE--ANCILLARIES
CODE PRELIMINARY TITLE [BLANK]
CODE BOOK I--OF PERSONS
CODE TITLE I--NATURAL AND JURIDICAL PERSONS
CHAPTER 1.  WOMEN
PART I.  IN GENERAL
§51.  Civil rights and duties
Women have the same rights, authority, privileges, and immunities, and
shall perform the same obligations and duties as men in the holding of office
including the civil functions of tutor, under tutor, curator, under curator,
administrator, executor, arbitrator, and notary public.
